title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad – Junior Research Fellow – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Fellow. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT (ISM) Dhanbad official website.

basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Fellow. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT (ISM) Dhanbad official website.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech (with NET/GATE qualification) or M.E./M.Tech (with GATE qualification) in Metallurgical Engineering, Materials Science & Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Polymer Engineering, Nanotechnology, Surface Engineering, or allied disciplines.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
